prompt: Create generated.py, validate it with pytest, recover from any failure, rerun validation, and finish only after the test passes.

metadata.description: Missing file recovery with an intentional failed validation, deferred finish, revision, and revalidation.
metadata.expected_pattern: create_file -> python_run(fail) -> finish(deferred) -> write_file -> python_run -> finish

prompt: Read calculator.py, run pytest to confirm the failure, rewrite calculator.py with the correct implementation, rerun pytest, and then finish.

metadata.description: Inspect-edit-test-revise loop over an existing buggy file with explicit validation before and after the rewrite.

prompt: Inspect app/formatter.py, run the formatter check from the app subdirectory, fix the file, rerun the check from app, and finish only after it succeeds.

metadata.description: Subdirectory validation loop with an existing buggy file, explicit failure recovery, and cwd-sensitive python_run.
metadata.expected_pattern: read_file -> python_run(cwd=app, fail) -> write_file -> python_run(cwd=app) -> finish
